# Ink

## Documentation Sets

- [Ink](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/llms-full.txt)

## Landing

- [Ink — Headless blog package for Filament](https://relaticle.github.io/ink): Drop a blog into any Filament 5 app. Ships admin, SEO, MCP tools, and Blade components — bring your own routes or opt into the built-in ones with a config flag.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/getting-started/installation): Install Ink in your Laravel application.
- [Frontend Setup (headless)](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/getting-started/frontend-setup): Build your own blog frontend using the package's Blade components.
- [Public-routes mode](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/getting-started/public-routes-mode): Get a working blog at /blog without writing controllers — opt in via config flags.
- [Blade Components](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/blade-components): All available Blade components for building your blog frontend.
- [Filament Admin](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/filament-admin): Managing blog posts, categories, and tags in the Filament admin panel.
- [MCP Tools](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/mcp-tools): 13 MCP tools for AI agent blog management.
- [Configuration](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/configuration): Full configuration reference for Ink.
- [Tags Taxonomy](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/tags): Opt-in many-to-many tags taxonomy with admin UI and public archive.
- [MediaLibrary Integration](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/media-library): Opt-in featured-image upload via spatie/laravel-medialibrary.
- [Search](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/search): Portable search across blog posts with a config-driven backend hook.
- [Schema](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/schema): Automatic JSON-LD schema emission for posts and listings.
- [Listing SEO](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/essentials/listing-seo): Per-page canonicals, titles, and metadata for listing routes.
- [Contributing](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/community/contributing): How to contribute to Ink.
- [License](https://relaticle.github.io/ink/community/license): License information.
